preset_reason: paper core exact BPC with elementary columns only
certificate: frontier certificate: a feasible incumbent has objective zero and both Gini and satisfaction terms are nonnegative
incumbent_source_detail: best-of-all verified incumbent selected from portfolio; UB only
incumbent_selection_reason: minimum verified true objective among tested candidates
notes: RunConfigSnapshot: algorithm_preset=paper-bpc-core, preset_certificate_scope=core_bpc_certificate_when_frontier_closes, pricing_engine=exact-label, final_pricing_engine=exact-label, column_tracks=elementary-only, rmp_column_space=elementary, relaxed_columns_in_rmp=false, large_instance_mode=off, station_set_backend=uint64, route_mask_all_subset_enumeration_enabled=true, incumbent_archive_auto=true, compact_fallback_enabled=false
parsed Hybrid GA text format; distances read from serialized matrix

Gamma-frontier diagnostic covers Gini intervals with fixed-Gini interval branch-price trees. It reports optimal only if every relevant interval is closed or bound-fathomed and the aggregated lower bound reaches the incumbent. Each interval also uses the valid trivial bound objective>=G>=interval_floor and a final-inventory pickup/route/Gini relaxation bound when it solves.
